scripts.db:create-migration: cd apps/sge-api && wrangler d1 migrations create sge-db-prod
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/sge-api && wrangler d1 migrations apply sge-db-prod --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: cd apps/sge-api && wrangler d1 migrations apply sge-db-prod --remote
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/sge-api && wrangler d1 execute sge-db-prod --local --file=../../packages/database/seeds/seed-all.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: cd apps/sge-api && wrangler d1 execute sge-db-prod --remote --file=../../packages/database/seeds/seed-all.sql
scripts.db:status: cd apps/sge-api && wrangler d1 execute sge-db-prod --local --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name; SELECT 'Usuarios cargados' AS CheckOK, count(*) FROM usuarios;"
